title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 58: Wan 2.2 Image Generation Workflows
description:
In this episode, I show you how to use the Wan 2.2 model inside ComfyUI for creating high-quality images. Even though Wan 2.2 was designed for video, the community has found it works surprisingly well for image generation, producing both realistic results and stylized illustrations.

We’ll cover everything you need to set up the workflow, including:
- Installing and loading Wan 2.2 low-noise models
- Using LoRA models for faster and more detailed results
- Working with upscalers
- Configuring settings such as CFG, sampling shift, and NAG 
- Creating text-to-image, image-to-image, and social media–ready workflows

By the end, you’ll be able to generate images for AI art, social media posts, and video frames, while customizing workflows for your own creative needs.

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
Step 1: use this link to join if you didn't join already https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3
Step 2: access directly this episode using this link: https://discord.com/channel
